TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Lei Huamin sinpu == Ka'ilolan ci Lei Huamin sinpu (Franz Leimer SMB,1928-1997) O nano Switzerland a tamdaw ci Lei Huamin simpu (Franz Leimer SMB), pasowal sa: "O sapiliyas to kalapakoyoc ko kiwiko." saan. Paka ci Lei kong han no kaemangay pangangan. O nano Switzerland a tamdaw ci Lei Huamin simpu, 1928 miheca masofoc i Bitraha no Switzerland kitakit, i 1957 miheca 11 folad nai Genoa minato no Italiya mikalic to tamina, saka tosa miheca saka cecay folad tangasa i minato no Kilong, itira i Sincu Holam kakkoyin minanam to sowal no Holam, nanoya tayni i Kakacawan no Posong a kowan mala simpu no kiwkay no Tinsukiw, saan mala patirengay to pinanaman to katayalan Taytung pasawali katayalan pinanaman congsin (Tungci cesin cungsin) citodongay, pasowal sa ci Lei Huamin simpu: "Dengan o pikiwiko, sakanga'ay no kaemanghay miliyas to kalapakoyoc no 'orip." saan. I 1963 miheca, tona misi'ayaw ko Taywan to kacowat no katayalan, nawhani caay ho kanga'ay ko rarakaten no lalan itiya, awaay ko katayalan, miliyas ko tamdamdaw tala roma niyaro', o sapifalicaw to saka nga'ay no 'orip, dengan o pafeli to pinanaman to saka fana' to kaira no kicik, mipatomadaw to sakatayal, mitelek patireng to pinanaman, i loma' ato kiwkay a picokeran, toya miheca fatihian sera no tinsukiw pawsang no Posong, patireng to kicik pinanaman. Nanoya ikor mihayda ko nipatirengan no Tinsukiw a Kongtung kaukong, o pikapian a pinanaman mapatireng, mihaop to awaayay ko katayalan a kapah, padamso to pinanaman to kicik, i 1965 miheca saka 2 folad, patireng to pinanaman, 'aloman ko yincumin, ato pina a pakoyocan kapah no Payrang, ikor patireng to no mapilihay kapah pinanaman "Ceciang pan", minanamay to kikay, Dingki, kilang, 'amoto, tosiya pinanam. Ira ko 3 miheca ko pinanam, patodong to kaen kamaro', romi'adan tayra ko kaemangay citodongay kaysya minanam, o dadaya ko pitilid, pasifana' ko singsi to tilid ato nicukaan sifana', mikongling a kihi payso, sahe to o nai laloma'an ni Lei Huamin sinpu ko padamsoay, ato kiwkay no Switzerland, sa'ayaw pinanaman, matiya o no Switzerland ko pipasifana'an, minanamay tayra i katayalan a kaysya, dadaya o tuilid ko ninanaman ko pasifana'. I salawinaan ni Lei Huamin sinpu a picoker, i 1966 miheca misadadahal patireng, matongal ko misasayhoay, sakikay a kikay a patodong, awaay ko katayoan pinanam rahoday ko minanamay, I 1983 miheca 1 folad 15 romi'ad, mapakaolah no Taytung siencenfo ci Lei Huamin sinpu, pakaolah t opipatireng ningra to Taytung pasawali katayalan pinanaman congsin (Tungci cesin cungsin), mapalafangcal ko pakoyocay wawa ato mapilihay no yincumin, i 1966 miheca 6 folad ci Lei Huamin sinpu, ciadada ko tireng to fala', minokay tayra i Switzerland mihanhan to tireng, oya a Taytung pasawali katayalan pinanaman congsin (Tungci cesin cungsin) pafeli han ko Hulien sa'etal kiwkay citodongay. I 1997 miheca 12 fiolad 24 romi'ad, ci Lei Huamin sinpu mapatay i Switzerland a isingan, ira 69 no mihecaan ningra, o roma' kitakit a tamdaw ci Lei Huamin sinpu, patahtah pacakat to 'orip to wawa no Posong, o Taytung pasawali katayalan pinanaman congsin (Tungci cesin cungsin) o kalemedan, kahemekan ko nga'ayay, kahemakan ko nidemakan ni Lei Huamin sinpu, tangasa anini, o Tungci cesin cungsin no Posong, oya to padoedo to pinanaman to tayal ko demak, itiniay i Taytung Senmo isingan a pisahalaka, rafas a sera, manga'ay o pidamaan to mato'asay kaitiraan. I 2019 miheca 4 folad 27 romi'ad, o sona: ni Lei Huamin sinpu ci Thomas padeteng sa a malahakolong to laloma'an tayni nai Switzerland miliso' to Taywan, halafin ko aro' no faki i Posong, micohong tayni i Taytung pasawali katayalan pinanaman congsin (Tungci cesin cungsin), pakanengneng to syasin no faki Lei Huamin sinpu ci Thomas mapakafit i Tungci cesin cungsin, tadamapacekil ko faloco', wata ko kalemed no Taywan a tamdaw, manga'ay aca ira ko nai Switzerland ca Lei Huamin sinpu, ato ci Xi zhiping sinpu (Rev. Jakob Hilber,1917-1985), sa'ayaway patireng to pinanaman to tayal pinanaman pitilidan no Taywan, tada o mahemekan no Taywan a tamdaw a miahowid cangra tatosa.
S.PHON: == …ĺ…ôi ńßo~u~uamin sinpo~u~u == ka °i…ĺo~u…ĺan ¶i …ĺ…ôi ńßo~u~uamin sinpo~u~u (fran* …ĺ…ôim…ôr smb~b~v,****-****) o~u nano~u swit*…ôr…ĺan…¨~…ģ a tam…¨~…ģaw ¶i …ĺ…ôi ńßo~u~uamin simpo~u~u (fran* …ĺ…ôim…ôr smb~b~v), paso~uwa…ĺ sa: "o~u sapi…ĺijas to~u ka…ĺapako~ujo~u ¶ ko~u kiwiko~u." saan. paka ¶i …ĺ…ôi ko~uŇč ńßan no~u ka…ômaŇčaj paŇčaŇčan. o~u nano~u swit*…ôr…ĺan…¨~…ģ a tam…¨~…ģaw ¶i …ĺ…ôi ńßo~u~uamin simpo~u~u, **** mińß…ô ¶a maso~ufo~u ¶ i b~b~vitrańßa no~u swit*…ôr…ĺan…¨~…ģ kitakit, i **** mińß…ô ¶a ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ nai *…ôno~ua minato~u no~u ita…ĺija mika…ĺi ¶ to~u tamina, saka to~usa mińß…ô ¶a saka ¶…ô ¶aj fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ taŇčasa i minato~u no~u ki…ĺo~uŇč, itira i sin ¶o~u~u ńßo~u…ĺam kakko~ujin minanam to~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u ńßo~u…ĺam, nano~uja tajni i kaka ¶awan no~u po~uso~uŇč a ko~uwan ma…ĺa simpo~u~u no~u kiwkaj no~u tinso~u~ukiw, saan ma…ĺa patir…ôŇčaj to~u pinanaman to~u kataja…ĺan tajto~u~uŇč pasawa…ĺi kataja…ĺan pinanaman ¶o~uŇčsin (to~u~uŇč ¶i ¶…ôsin ¶o~u~uŇčsin) ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj, paso~uwa…ĺ sa ¶i …ĺ…ôi ńßo~u~uamin simpo~u~u: "…¨~…ģ…ôŇčan o~u pikiwiko~u, sakaŇča °aj no~u ka…ômaŇčńßaj mi…ĺijas to~u ka…ĺapako~ujo~u ¶ no~u °o~urip." saan. i **** mińß…ô ¶a, to~una misi °ajaw ko~u tajwan to~u ka ¶o~uwat no~u kataja…ĺan, nawńßani ¶aaj ńßo~u kaŇča °aj ko~u rarakat…ôn no~u …ĺa…ĺan itija, awaaj ko~u kataja…ĺan, mi…ĺijas ko~u tam…¨~…ģam…¨~…ģaw ta…ĺa ro~uma nijaro~u °, o~u sapifa…ĺi ¶aw to~u saka Ňča °aj no~u °o~urip, …¨~…ģ…ôŇčan o~u paf…ô…ĺi to~u pinanaman to~u saka fana ° to~u kaira no~u ki ¶ik, mipato~uma…¨~…ģaw to~u sakataja…ĺ, mit…ô…ĺ…ôk patir…ôŇč to~u pinanaman, i …ĺo~uma ° ato~u kiwkaj a pi ¶o~uk…ôran, to~uja mińß…ô ¶a fatińßian s…ôra no~u tinso~u~ukiw pawsaŇč no~u po~uso~uŇč, patir…ôŇč to~u ki ¶ik pinanaman. nano~uja iko~ur mińßaj…¨~…ģa ko~u nipatir…ôŇčan no~u tinso~u~ukiw a ko~uŇčto~u~uŇč kao~u~uko~uŇč, o~u pikapian a pinanaman mapatir…ôŇč, mińßao~up to~u awaajaj ko~u kataja…ĺan a kapańß, pa…¨~…ģamso~u to~u pinanaman to~u ki ¶ik, i **** mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, patir…ôŇč to~u pinanaman, °a…ĺo~uman ko~u jin ¶o~u~umin, ato~u pina a pako~ujo~u ¶an kapańß no~u pajraŇč, iko~ur patir…ôŇč to~u no~u mapi…ĺińßaj kapańß pinanaman " ¶…ô ¶iaŇč pan", minanamaj to~u kikaj, …¨~…ģiŇčki, ki…ĺaŇč, °amo~uto~u, to~usija pinanam. ira ko~u * mińß…ô ¶a ko~u pinanam, pato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč to~u ka…ôn kamaro~u °, ro~umi °a…¨~…ģan tajra ko~u ka…ômaŇčaj …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an ni …ĺ…ôi ńßo~u~uamin sinpo~u~u ko~u pa…¨~…ģamso~uaj, ato~u kiwkaj no~u swit*…ôr…ĺan…¨~…ģ, sa °ajaw pinanaman, matija o~u no~u swit*…ôr…ĺan…¨~…ģ ko~u pipasifana °an, minanamaj tajra i kataja…ĺan a kajsja, …¨~…ģa…¨~…ģaja o~u to~u~ui…ĺi…¨~…ģ ko~u ninanaman ko~u pasifana °. i sa…ĺawinaan ni …ĺ…ôi ńßo~u~uamin sinpo~u~u a pi ¶o~uk…ôr, i **** mińß…ô ¶a misa…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģańßa…ĺ patir…ôŇč, mato~uŇča…ĺ ko~u misasajńßo~uaj, sakikaj a kikaj a pato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč, awaaj ko~u katajo~uan pinanam rańßo~u…¨~…ģaj ko~u minanamaj, i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, mapakao~u…ĺańß no~u ka…ĺ…ôm…ô…¨~…ģan, kańß…ôm…ôkan ko~u Ňča °ajaj, kańß…ômakan ko~u ni…¨~…ģ…ômakan ni …ĺ…ôi ńßo~u~uamin sinpo~u~u, taŇčasa anini, o~u to~u~uŇč ¶i ¶…ôsin ¶o~u~uŇčsin no~u po~uso~uŇč, o~uja to~u mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, o~u so~una: ni …ĺ…ôi ńßo~u~uamin sinpo~u~u ¶i tńßo~umas pa…¨~…ģ…ôt…ôŇč sa a ma…ĺańßako~u…ĺo~uŇč to~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an tajni nai swit*…ôr…ĺan…¨~…ģ mi…ĺiso~u ° ¶a ira ko~u nai swit*…ôr…ĺan…¨~…ģ ¶a …ĺ…ôi ńßo~u~uamin sinpo~u~u, ato~u ¶i xi *ńßipiŇč sinpo~u~u (r…ôb~v. *ako~ub~b~v ńßi…ĺb~b~v…ôr,****-****), sa °ajawaj patir…ôŇč to~u pinanaman to~u taja…ĺ pinanaman piti…ĺi…¨~…ģan no~u tajwan, ta…¨~…ģa o~u mańß…ôm…ôkan no~u tajwan a tam…¨~…ģaw a miańßo~uwi…¨~…ģ ¶aŇčra tato~usa.
S.FORM: == Lei Huamin sinpu == Ka'ilolan ci Lei Huamin sinpu (Franz Leimer SMB,1928-1997) O nano Switzerland a tamdaw ci Lei Huamin simpu (Franz Leimer SMB), pasowal sa: "O sapiliyas to kalapakoyoc ko kiwiko." saan. Paka ci Lei kong han no kaemangay pangangan. O nano Switzerland a tamdaw ci Lei Huamin simpu, 1928 miheca masofoc i Bitraha no Switzerland kitakit, i 1957 miheca 11 folad nai Genoa minato no Italiya mikalic to tamina, saka tosa miheca saka cecay folad tangasa i minato no Kilong, itira i Sincu Holam kakkoyin minanam to sowal no Holam, nanoya tayni i Kakacawan no Posong a kowan mala simpu no kiwkay no Tinsukiw, saan mala patirengay to pinanaman to katayalan Taytung pasawali katayalan pinanaman congsin (Tungci cesin cungsin) citodongay, pasowal sa ci Lei Huamin simpu: "Dengan o pikiwiko, sakanga'ay no kaemanghay miliyas to kalapakoyoc no 'orip." saan. I 1963 miheca, tona misi'ayaw ko Taywan to kacowat no katayalan, nawhani caay ho kanga'ay ko rarakaten no lalan itiya, awaay ko katayalan, miliyas ko tamdamdaw tala roma niyaro', o sapifalicaw to saka nga'ay no 'orip, dengan o pafeli to pinanaman to saka fana' to kaira no kicik, mipatomadaw to sakatayal, mitelek patireng to pinanaman, i loma' ato kiwkay a picokeran, toya miheca fatihian sera no tinsukiw pawsang no Posong, patireng to kicik pinanaman. Nanoya ikor mihayda ko nipatirengan no Tinsukiw a Kongtung kaukong, o pikapian a pinanaman mapatireng, mihaop to awaayay ko katayalan a kapah, padamso to pinanaman to kicik, i 1965 miheca saka 2 folad, patireng to pinanaman, 'aloman ko yincumin, ato pina a pakoyocan kapah no Payrang, ikor patireng to no mapilihay kapah pinanaman "Ceciang pan", minanamay to kikay, Dingki, kilang, 'amoto, tosiya pinanam. Ira ko 3 miheca ko pinanam, patodong to kaen kamaro', romi'adan tayra ko kaemangay citodongay kaysya minanam, o dadaya ko pitilid, pasifana' ko singsi to tilid ato nicukaan sifana', mikongling a kihi payso, sahe to o nai laloma'an ni Lei Huamin sinpu ko padamsoay, ato kiwkay no Switzerland, sa'ayaw pinanaman, matiya o no Switzerland ko pipasifana'an, minanamay tayra i katayalan a kaysya, dadaya o tuilid ko ninanaman ko pasifana'. I salawinaan ni Lei Huamin sinpu a picoker, i 1966 miheca misadadahal patireng, matongal ko misasayhoay, sakikay a kikay a patodong, awaay ko katayoan pinanam rahoday ko minanamay, I 1983 miheca 1 folad 15 romi'ad, mapakaolah no Taytung siencenfo ci Lei Huamin sinpu, pakaolah t opipatireng ningra to Taytung pasawali katayalan pinanaman congsin (Tungci cesin cungsin), mapalafangcal ko pakoyocay wawa ato mapilihay no yincumin, i 1966 miheca 6 folad ci Lei Huamin sinpu, ciadada ko tireng to fala', minokay tayra i Switzerland mihanhan to tireng, oya a Taytung pasawali katayalan pinanaman congsin (Tungci cesin cungsin) pafeli han ko Hulien sa'etal kiwkay citodongay. I 1997 miheca 12 fiolad 24 romi'ad, ci Lei Huamin sinpu mapatay i Switzerland a isingan, ira 69 no mihecaan ningra, o roma' kitakit a tamdaw ci Lei Huamin sinpu, patahtah pacakat to 'orip to wawa no Posong, o Taytung pasawali katayalan pinanaman congsin (Tungci cesin cungsin) o kalemedan, kahemekan ko nga'ayay, kahemakan ko nidemakan ni Lei Huamin sinpu, tangasa anini, o Tungci cesin cungsin no Posong, oya to padoedo to pinanaman to tayal ko demak, itiniay i Taytung Senmo isingan a pisahalaka, rafas a sera, manga'ay o pidamaan to mato'asay kaitiraan. I 2019 miheca 4 folad 27 romi'ad, o sona: ni Lei Huamin sinpu ci Thomas padeteng sa a malahakolong to laloma'an tayni nai Switzerland miliso' to Taywan, halafin ko aro' no faki i Posong, micohong tayni i Taytung pasawali katayalan pinanaman congsin (Tungci cesin cungsin), pakanengneng to syasin no faki Lei Huamin sinpu ci Thomas mapakafit i Tungci cesin cungsin, tadamapacekil ko faloco', wata ko kalemed no Taywan a tamdaw, manga'ay aca ira ko nai Switzerland ca Lei Huamin sinpu, ato ci Xi zhiping sinpu (Rev. Jakob Hilber,1917-1985), sa'ayaway patireng to pinanaman to tayal pinanaman pitilidan no Taywan, tada o mahemekan no Taywan a tamdaw a miahowid cangra tatosa.

a ko~uwan ma…ĺa simpo~u~u no~u kiwkaj no~u tinso~u~ukiw, saan ma…ĺa patir…ôŇčaj to~u pinanaman to~u kataja…ĺan tajto~u~uŇč pasawa…ĺi kataja…ĺan pinanaman ¶o~uŇčsin (to~u~uŇč ¶i ¶…ôsin ¶o~u~uŇčsin) ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj, paso~uwa…ĺ sa ¶i …ĺ…ôi ńßo~u~uamin simpo~u~u: "…¨~…ģ…ôŇčan o~u pikiwiko~u, sakaŇča °aj no~u ka…ômaŇčńßaj mi…ĺijas to~u ka…ĺapako~ujo~u ¶ no~u °o~urip." saan. i **** mińß…ô ¶a, to~una misi °ajaw ko~u tajwan to~u ka ¶o~uwat no~u kataja…ĺan, nawńßani ¶aaj ńßo~u kaŇča °aj ko~u rarakat…ôn no~u …ĺa…ĺan itija, awaaj ko~u kataja…ĺan, mi…ĺijas ko~u tam…¨~…ģam…¨~…ģaw ta…ĺa ro~uma nijaro~u °, o~u sapifa…ĺi ¶aw to~u saka Ňča °aj no~u °o~urip, …¨~…ģ…ôŇčan o~u paf…ô…ĺi to~u pinanaman to~u saka fana ° to~u kaira no~u ki ¶ik, mipato~uma…¨~…ģaw to~u sakataja…ĺ, mit…ô…ĺ…ôk patir…ôŇč
